programme.title: E5 - Search On The Bayou
programme.desc: Matt Riffle investigates the murder of a New Orleans native, who was shot and killed after a brief altercation. Det. Tanisha Smith investigates the homicide of a mother and the abduction of her daughter.

programme.title: E12 - Meatballs With A Chance Of Poison
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a traffic stop leads to a shocking arrest; a driver flees an accident with a man clinging to the hood of her car, and more!

programme.title: E6 - Accidental Confession
programme.desc: A love triangle at the University of Florida results in the murder of a popular student. An undeniable digital trail leads straight to his murderer.

programme.title: E11 - Busted By Blueberries
programme.desc: A man finds himself in jail over stolen blueberries, and a woman who has spent her life running from the law decides to surrender in hopes of making amends with her son.

programme.title: E3 - Cody’s Football Season Training Camp
programme.desc: Get ready for game day with Cody's training camp! Imagine racing on extreme motor trikes, join friends on the playground, and go on a fun family hike. Learn about healthy foods at the grocery store to get strong for the big football season!

programme.title: E3 - Animal Friends Sports Cup
programme.desc: Join JJ and his animal pals for the Animal Friends Sports Cup! Race in a thrilling go-kart track, learn to get back up when you fall down skiing, and work together to build a fantastic box car racer. With a little encouragement, you can do anything!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E1 - Awesome Animal Facts!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning awesome facts about all kinds of animals! He & D.BO travel back in time to meet the biggest dinosaurs, like the Argentinosaurus, & even try to keep a T-Rex as a pet for a day! Back in the present, they shrink down to count a shark's teeth with a pilot fish dentist. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how elephants use their trunks to keep cool & discovers why cats have whiskers from a local feline celebrity.

programme.title: E3 - Cody’s Football Season Training Camp
programme.desc: Get ready for game day with Cody's training camp! Imagine racing on extreme motor trikes, join friends on the playground, and go on a fun family hike. Learn about healthy foods at the grocery store to get strong for the big football season!

programme.title: E3 - Animal Friends Sports Cup
programme.desc: Join JJ and his animal pals for the Animal Friends Sports Cup! Race in a thrilling go-kart track, learn to get back up when you fall down skiing, and work together to build a fantastic box car racer. With a little encouragement, you can do anything!

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E3 - Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning, growing & having fun! First, he gets covered in mud & needs to get clean, but he's frightened by the big, noisy carwash! He has to work up the courage to try it himself. Then, after eating too many sweets, Buster gets a sore tooth & Amber the Ambulance teaches him the importance of keeping his teeth clean. In a race against Terry Tractor, Buster also learns that slow & steady can sometimes win the race!

programme.title: E5 - Fight Club
programme.desc: Step into the ring with nature’s top brawlers, who use violence to get what they need. Watch the cannibalistic Portia spider devour the competition, uncover the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas, and catch an epic neck-whipping giraffe battle.

programme.title: E6 - Gangsters
programme.desc: Get inside the toughest gangs that roam the Earth and see what true grit looks like in the wild. Chase a band of marauding locusts, watch the coconut octopus ambush its next meal, and meet a flock of finches who’ve developed a taste for blood.

programme.title: E3 - Risk and Reward
programme.desc: The drought is finally over, but traversing the forest for food is still a gamble. See some leaders take the risk, leaving home territories undefended to feast on a cicada boom. When they return, trespassers are ready for a fight.

programme.title: E4 - The Road to Independence
programme.desc: As the babies grow, new power struggles break out in each troop. Watch as every member, from fierce Queen Crystal to low-ranking Erica, jockeys for position. Meanwhile, the babies start to understand how allies and enemies will shape their future.

programme.title: E6 - Migration
programme.desc: Epic flights, adventurous sea journeys and exhausting road trips all play a key part in the lives of many species. These empires travel in search of food, shelter or a mate. But booking and organizing travel is no easy feat when those plans involve hundreds – even thousands – of individuals.

programme.title: E5 - Fight Club
programme.desc: Step into the ring with nature’s top brawlers, who use violence to get what they need. Watch the cannibalistic Portia spider devour the competition, uncover the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas, and catch an epic neck-whipping giraffe battle.

programme.title: E6 - Gangsters
programme.desc: Get inside the toughest gangs that roam the Earth and see what true grit looks like in the wild. Chase a band of marauding locusts, watch the coconut octopus ambush its next meal, and meet a flock of finches who’ve developed a taste for blood.

programme.title: E2 - Return of the Light
programme.desc: Experience the north Atlantic’s intense, brief summer with its animal residents. Follow Arctic fox cubs learning to hunt for survival, an otter pup going solo for the first time, a mate-seeking puffin, and tiny reindeer taking their first steps.

programme.title: E3 - Risk and Reward
programme.desc: The drought is finally over, but traversing the forest for food is still a gamble. See some leaders take the risk, leaving home territories undefended to feast on a cicada boom. When they return, trespassers are ready for a fight.

programme.title: E4 - The Road to Independence
programme.desc: As the babies grow, new power struggles break out in each troop. Watch as every member, from fierce Queen Crystal to low-ranking Erica, jockeys for position. Meanwhile, the babies start to understand how allies and enemies will shape their future.

programme.title: E4 - The Road to Independence
programme.desc: As the babies grow, new power struggles break out in each troop. Watch as every member, from fierce Queen Crystal to low-ranking Erica, jockeys for position. Meanwhile, the babies start to understand how allies and enemies will shape their future.

programme.title: Tusker: Brotherhood of Elephants
programme.desc: Become immersed in the intricate lives of tuskers with Craig, Pascal, and Esau, three male African elephants in all stages of life. Get a rare glimpse into the subtle language, complex interactions, and deep bonds of the world’s largest land mammal.

programme.title: E4 - Finding a Family
programme.desc: Mona, a female cotton top tamarin is all alone in her tropical forest home. She has left the security of her birth family to search for an unrelated troop which might provide her with a future mate.

programme.title: E1 - Sweeping Shores
programme.desc: The African intertidal zone is home to a unique universe of plants and creatures. Here, life has adapted to survive in a challenging marine environment - some species are able to live on exposed rocks, while others prefer the shelter of rock pools.

programme.desc: Step into the ring with nature’s top brawlers, who use violence to get what they need. Watch the cannibalistic Portia spider devour the competition, uncover the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas, and catch an epic neck-whipping giraffe battle.

programme.title: E6 - Gangsters
programme.desc: Get inside the toughest gangs that roam the Earth and see what true grit looks like in the wild. Chase a band of marauding locusts, watch the coconut octopus ambush its next meal, and meet a flock of finches who’ve developed a taste for blood.

programme.title: Tusker: Brotherhood of Elephants

programme.title: E6 - Migration
programme.desc: Epic flights, adventurous sea journeys and exhausting road trips all play a key part in the lives of many species. These empires travel in search of food, shelter or a mate. But booking and organizing travel is no easy feat when those plans involve hundreds – even thousands – of individuals.

programme.title: E1 - Sweeping Shores
programme.desc: The African intertidal zone is home to a unique universe of plants and creatures. Here, life has adapted to survive in a challenging marine environment - some species are able to live on exposed rocks, while others prefer the shelter of rock pools.

programme.title: E5 - Fight Club
programme.desc: Step into the ring with nature’s top brawlers, who use violence to get what they need. Watch the cannibalistic Portia spider devour the competition, uncover the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas, and catch an epic neck-whipping giraffe battle.

programme.title: E3 - Risk and Reward
programme.desc: The drought is finally over, but traversing the forest for food is still a gamble. See some leaders take the risk, leaving home territories undefended to feast on a cicada boom. When they return, trespassers are ready for a fight.

programme.title: E4 - The Road to Independence
programme.desc: As the babies grow, new power struggles break out in each troop. Watch as every member, from fierce Queen Crystal to low-ranking Erica, jockeys for position. Meanwhile, the babies start to understand how allies and enemies will shape their future.

programme.title: E110
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Ninja Art Of Heart, Popomaru!

Join her on an exciting journey to discover how to handle emotions with skill and joy!

programme.title: TV Patrol Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. programme.title: E3 - My Childhood Favorites
programme.desc: Rachel reimagines her favourite childhood recipes. She makes beef and butternut squash stew, fishfingers with pea puree and rice pudding with caramel crisps.

programme.title: E4 - Tasty Parcels
programme.desc: Rachel shows how the best food can come in small packages. She serves up wraps stuffed with roasted vegetables, puff pastry parcels and pan-fried dumplings.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Masterchef presenter John Torode embarks on an epic culinary adventure across Asia, seeking out the most inspiring cooks the continent has to offer.

programme.desc: Kirsten demonstrates an array of incredibly clever and innovative tricks, tips and cheats to bring the wow factor into their home baking.

programme.title: E106
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E9 - Echo Hunter/The Type-Written Word
programme.desc: Basel-based Christian Zehnder is a vocalist, a dreamer... and an echo hunter. He developed Echo Topos, an application to map echoes in Switzerland. In Lausanne, Jacques Perrier is one of the last remaining typewriter repairmen in business.

programme.title: E10 - A Sea Of Silk/Tending The Earth
programme.desc: Chiara Vigo is one of the world's last remaining sea silk weavers, master of a little-known but centuries-old art, and one in danger of extinction. Becoming a farmer at almost 40 is not so easy. But that's what Laura Moser did when she took over her parents' farm.

programme.title: E1 - Mussels And Fries My Way
programme.desc: Together with comedian Brigitte Rosset, Annick Jeanmairet offers you the recipe for a popular dish: mussels and fries. You will learn how to make crispy fries without a deep fryer or an AirFryer. Discovery of the day: artisanal marshmallows.

programme.title: E6 - A Man At The Margin
programme.desc: Sebastien Guenot is an unusual artist on the margins of several worlds. Through his drawings, created on several different media, he expresses the profound emotions he experiences in his dreams. A journey through the landscapes of the Swiss Jura and their mysterious clearings.

programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. programme.title: E4 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: The iconic Giant Panda is on the brink. With only 1600 left in the wild, pressures on their natural habitat and a notoriously small window for reproduction are edging them towards extinction - fast. Over 1 year, we go behind-the-scenes and follow the incredible work of a dedicated group of zookeepers and vets as they race to get Singapore’s famed couple… to fall in ‘love’. The team from the River Safari has a tough road ahead. This film follows the year that Kai Kai and Jia Jia become the focus of attention not just from the general public but from the scientists themselves in the greatest challenge Singapore Zoo has faced yet.

programme.title: E3 - Alligator & Yaupon Tea

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: The iconic Giant Panda is on the brink. With only 1600 left in the wild, pressures on their natural habitat and a notoriously small window for reproduction are edging them towards extinction - fast. Over 1 year, we go behind-the-scenes and follow the incredible work of a dedicated group of zookeepers and vets as they race to get Singapore’s famed couple… to fall in ‘love’. The team from the River Safari has a tough road ahead. This film follows the year that Kai Kai and Jia Jia become the focus of attention not just from the general public but from the scientists themselves in the greatest challenge Singapore Zoo has faced yet.

While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. programme.title: E6 - Game Night Legends
programme.desc: In the 1970s, the board game industry is aimed almost entirely at children, until a literal game changer comes along in Trivial Pursuit. Redefining the possibilities for adult fun.

programme.title: E46 - Beer Run
programme.desc: A Milwaukee company experiments with something new. What starts as an unappealing low-calorie beer becomes the number one beer in America, sparking a battle between two titans for the crown of light beer.

programme.title: E3 - Brave For Battle
programme.desc: Jaime makes way to the Philippines' Queen City of Cebu, where she conquers its roaring canyons, calms her nerves with some pythons, and harnesses her fighting skills in the country's first battleground.

programme.title: E4 - Bohol In One
programme.desc: In the majestic island of Bohol, Jaime sharpens her blacksmithing skills, follows in the steps of a resolute underground revolutionary, and learns a dying language crafted from human body parts.

programme.title: E3 - Barbarossa
programme.desc: Operation Barbarossa, Nazi Germany's surprise invasion of the Soviet Union, launches on June 22, 1941. In what is the largest military operation in history, Hitler aims to capture their economic resources.

programme.title: E4 - Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Japan escalates its war in China, drawing increasing US sanctions. Driven by resource shortages and military ideology, Japan attacks Pearl Harbor in a move that will reshape the course of World War II.

programme.title: Chandni
programme.desc: Chandni's fiance, Rohit, is paralysed in an accident and she is forced to relocate to Mumbai where her boss, Lalit, falls for her. However, she faces a dilemma when Rohit returns and woos her too. Release Year: 1989 Director: Yash Chopra Awards: Filmfare Awards- Best Cinematographer- Manmohan Singh

programme.title: Shabri
programme.desc: Shabri kills a cop who tortures her brother and tries to rape her. But when her brother is killed, she decides to avenge his death. Release Year: 2011 Director: Lalit Marathe

programme.title: Rab Ne Bana Di Jodi
programme.desc: Surinder, a simple man, falls for a vivacious Tani and gets married to her. In order to impress her, he undergoes a complete makeover and becomes Raj. Release Year: 2008 Director: Aditya Chopra Awards: Best Actor: Shah Rukh Khan Apsara Film Producers Guild Awards; Best Playback Singer - Male: Sukhwinder Singh, Best Scene of the Year Filmfare Awards

programme.title: Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Knowing that Mak, the middle-aged newspaper editor often misses his late spouse, his beloved children persuade him to date Siu Fung, the singer who lives next door. At this moment, Siu Fung's cousin, Uncle Sam, returns from the states and proposes to marry Siu Fung. One day, dispute happens between Sam and Mak which makes Siu Fung so mad with Mak...

programme.title: Aces Go Places
programme.desc: The Mafia is concluding a secret deal in Hong Kong when the loot to be handed over, a consignment of valuable diamonds, is stolen by someone who left a white glove. Based on this clue, the police thinks that it is the work of the infamous international thief 'White Glove'. Interpol is contacted and an ace detective, Baldy, is sent from New York to investigate. He is assisted by a local woman inspector known for her toughness. They start on a wrong footing initially but grow to be very fond of one another...

programme.title: Forbidden City Cop
programme.desc: Fat is a neglected member of 'The King's Guardian'. Kam dynasty uses an excuse to assassinate the Emperor. 'Fat' smells the trouble and go along secretly to protect the Emperor...

programme.title: Hasankeyf - The Town That Drove Away
programme.desc: The construction of the Ilisu Dam in Turkey flooded priceless cultural monuments. These included the city of Hasankeyf, in the south-east of the country. The last inhabitants had to watch as their centuries-old culture disappeared.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E9 - 異國唱響《海闊天空》
programme.desc: 由劉宇寧、龔俊、孫紅雷、李乃文、陳赫、陳星旭、王玉雯、歐陽娣娣組成爆笑「地球團」，沿著地球脈絡從中國出發，感受北緯40度的煙火氣，通過遊戲任務解鎖各地文化與美食，用新鮮有趣的方式，探索全世界的同頻快樂。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E9 - 塞外東巡 (下)
programme.desc: 中的名場面，用現代方式表達其中蘊藏的經典文化與精神內涵，彰顯中華文明突出特性。邀請陳銘、喻恩泰、楊迪、王子異組成「萬卷遊學團」，羅一舟、張凌赫、張曉龍、王耀慶、王鶴棣、曾可妮作為「風雅體驗官」，分別體驗五場穿越千年的古今同游，根據遊學攻略不斷加載知識技能，最終完成「傳世名作名場面」的融創秀。

programme.title: E9 - 一次性打卡6大非遺項目
programme.desc: 「極挑團」原班人馬將與新成員一起解鎖更多挑戰，他們將與廣大觀眾一起跨越大江南北，體驗國民生活百態，用真心探訪這片古老土地上正在發生的溫情故事，以更豐富的視角觸摸這卷山河下每一位個體的對美好生活的深切期望。

programme.title: E9 - 異國唱響《海闊天空》
programme.desc: 由劉宇寧、龔俊、孫紅雷、李乃文、陳赫、陳星旭、王玉雯、歐陽娣娣組成爆笑「地球團」，沿著地球脈絡從中國出發，感受北緯40度的煙火氣，通過遊戲任務解鎖各地文化與美食，用新鮮有趣的方式，探索全世界的同頻快樂。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E42
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E2 - Reid's Palace, Madeira
programme.desc: Monica Galetti and Giles Coren visit Reid's Palace on Madeira. Giles irons bedspreads in a suite once loved by Winston Churchill, and Monica cleans crabs out of the historic tidal swimming pool.

programme.desc: Besties Amanda Holden and Alan Carr arrive at the picturesque Ionian island of Corfu. However, it's anything but idyllic as they discover a big fat Greek renovation lies ahead.

programme.title: E5 - Spice Week
programme.desc: It's spice week in the Bake Off Tent. For the first challenge, the bakers have to make spiced tarts. One of the most challenging technical bakes of the season sees the bakers attempt steamed ginger puddings and the showstopper requires the bakers to make baklava, complete with their own phyllo pastry.

programme.title: E3 - Grand Park Rovinj, Croatia
programme.desc: Giles explores a hidden art gallery deep inside the structure and prunes the thousands of plants that frame the view of the old town. Meanwhile, Monica cleans Europe's biggest single glass window, and together they go truffle hunting with dogs in the Istrian landscape.

programme.title: Crayon Shinchan: The Storm Called!: Me and the Space Princess
programme.desc: Shinnosuke, and his sister Himawari, have a fight over a plate of custard. Suddenly, two mysterious men appear in green clothing and hats bearing sunflower emblems. They refer to Shin-chan's sister as a princess, and pass a paper to Shin-chan who signs it without hesitating. The Nohara family is promptly abducted to a UFO in a scene that draws some visual concepts from the 'Phantom Zone' jail, used in the Superman motion picture series. Shin-chan and his family all travel aboard the UFO to the 'Himawari planet' on a mysterious and important mission that affects Earth, and may decide the fate of peace across the entire universe.
